hooks.prompt:
Review the code change for GraphQL issues. Check for:
1. N+1 query problem — resolvers fetching related data in a loop instead of using DataLoader
2. Missing error handling in resolvers — unhandled errors expose stack traces to clients
3. No input validation — GraphQL inputs should be validated before processing
4. Overfetching in queries — selecting all fields when only a few are needed
5. Missing authentication/authorization checks in resolvers
6. Unbounded list queries — no pagination (first/after or limit/offset) on collection fields
7. Missing null checks — nullable fields not handled in client code
8. Schema using generic types (String for IDs, dates) instead of custom scalars
9. Mutations not returning the modified object — clients can't update cache
10. Missing optimistic response in Apollo Client mutations

Respond {"ok": true} if no issues found, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue description"} if problems detected.
